hero.title: Digital growth systems for physical businesses in Jordan
hero.subtitle: Book a real 30-minute demo, choose the package you want, and let the backend store every request in a way the owner can actually review.
hero.offerLabel: First 2 approved clients get month 1 free.
hero.offerDisclaimer: This stays visible only while real approved awards remain available.

realBookingFlow.title: Real booking flow
realBookingFlow.body: The CTA opens a real booking form that stores the request instead of a fake success modal.

adminVisibleRequests.title: Admin-visible requests
adminVisibleRequests.body: Every submission is designed to land in the admin queue with slot, package, and follow-up state.

safeBackendFallbacks.title: Safe backend fallbacks
safeBackendFallbacks.body: If email or calendar providers are not configured yet, the app still stores the request and flags manual follow-up.

whyThisBuild.title: This version is designed to behave like a product, not a pretty prototype.
whyThisBuild.packagesTitle: Choose a path, then book the meeting.
whyThisBuild.packagesBody: The demo request stays grounded in the backend: package choice, preferred language, slot, contact details, and launch-offer interest.

booking.title: Schedule Your Demo
booking.subtitle: Pick a package and time that works for you

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.message: Your demo has been scheduled. Check your email for details.
confirmation.manualMessage: Your request was saved. Our team will confirm the meeting time shortly.

booking.slotUnavailable: This time slot is no longer available
booking.noSlotsAvailable: No available slots for this date
booking.requestQueueDesc: Your request enters the Numuw Hub operations queue. An architect will review your parameters prior to onboarding.
booking.contextPlaceholder: Define the business problem, target metric, or integration requirement.
booking.supportFollowup: Numuw Hub operations will follow up from {supportEmail}.
booking.noSlots: No available slots for this day.
booking.ammanTime: Sunday to Thursday, 9:00 to 17:00 Amman time

demo.name: Free Demo
demo.description: A real 30-minute discovery call to review your current growth bottlenecks, answer questions, and confirm the right package.

starter.name: Starter Setup
starter.description: For businesses that need a clean launch plan, booking flow setup, and clear next actions without a heavy ongoing commitment.

growth.name: Growth Engine
growth.description: For teams that want recurring growth support, better lead handling, and a tighter execution loop across channels and operations.

scale.name: Scale Partner
scale.description: For businesses ready for deeper implementation support, tighter reporting, and a more hands-on operating model.

offer.bannerAvailable: Launch Special: First {remaining} approved client(s) get Month 1 Free
offer.disclaimer: This stays visible only while real approved awards remain available.
offer.notEligible: Launch offer is no longer available

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Owner visibility for every booking request
admin.description: This is the operational surface for demo requests. The point is not vanity metrics. The point is: where do requests land, what needs manual follow-up, and what still depends on env configuration.
admin.noRequestsYet: No requests yet. Submit one from the public booking flow to populate this queue.

footer.description: Backend-first booking flows for physical businesses that need a real demo process instead of dead CTAs.
footer.copyright: © {year} numuw.hub. Built for a real launch path on Vercel and Supabase.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.supabaseNotConfigured: Booking system temporarily unavailable. Please email support@numuwhub.biz
errors.slotTaken: This time slot has been booked by someone else. Please pick another.
errors.noServicesAvailable: No services available at the moment.

support.readyForRealLaunch: Ready for a real launch workflow
support.degradeNotCrash: Requests default to manual follow-up if external providers are still missing. The site should degrade, not crash.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the admin dashboard
auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up to access your dashboard
auth.adminAccessSubtitle: Enter your operational credentials to access the internal dashboard.
auth.createIdentitySubtitle: Create an identity to access your private architecture.

dashboard.title: My Bookings
dashboard.subtitle: View and manage your booking requests
dashboard.noBookings: You haven't made any bookings yet.

services.title: Book the real demo, then choose how deep the engagement should go.
services.subtitle: Pick the package that best matches the business, then lock in a real 30-minute slot. Every submission lands in the backend queue for review and follow-up.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

checkout.createIdentityToBind: Create an identity to bind this architecture.

page.heroSubtitle: Real booking pipeline. Real admin review. Real follow-up. Built for Jordan.
page.opsBody: The scroll stops here because the actual workflow matters. Every step triggers a real database operation.
page.step1Body: Select depth. Each choice maps to a backend record.
page.step2Body: API checks conflicts instantly. No simulated availability.
page.step3Body: Real person reviews notes, status, and offer enforcement.
page.landscapeTitle: Built strictly for the Jordanian market.
page.ctaSubtitle: Stop planning. Lock in the call. Look at the real admin view.
